text.title: Deprecated API Sweeper Recipe Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example demonstrating the procedure and output contract.

example.title: Sweep before K8s 1.32 upgrade
example.code: Cluster: production-eu-1 (currently 1.29). Charts: 7 internal + 12 upstream. Pluto findings: 4 (extensions/v1beta1 Ingress in 2 charts, policy/v1beta1 PodDisruptionBudget in 1 chart, autoscaling/v2beta2 HPA in 1 chart). Kubent findings: 2 (matched a subset). Merged + deduped = 4 unique findings. Replacement APIs cited per row. Owner=platform-team-lead. Follow-up issue per finding.
example.note: Every required field populated; rationale cites at least one input by name; owner is a single named handle; version + last_reviewed present.
